title: New Directives on NPA Provisioning and FCNR Account Limits

chunks.section_title: Section 105 - NPA Provisioning Guidelines for Commercial Banks
chunks.text: Banks must maintain a provisioning coverage ratio of at least 70% for all non-performing assets (NPA) to ensure buffer safety. Credit risk assessments must be updated quarterly to evaluate exposure.
The maximum interest rate that can be offered on Foreign Currency Non-Resident (FCNR) deposits shall be capped at SOFR plus 250 basis points. Remittances must follow the standard FEMA channels.
